analysis: The project currently has a basic HTML structure with some CSS and JavaScript files. The theme is not yet fully developed for a black hole topic with animated slides and objects. The CSS file needs to be completed with cosmic and dark themes, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file requires a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon and interactive planets. The JavaScript file needs to fix syntax errors and implement functionality for animated slides and interactive elements.
